title: Evangelion Panned Scenes
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Panned Scenes             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Apr 21, 2017 10:21 pm Panning scenes from Neon Genesis Evangelion (1995) So, I found this on imgur... not sure if someone from here posted it, but there's a good 200 images there from all the panned scenes in the show. Below are a few samples, all of them are pretty good resolution. Hope you enjoy the find! Evangelion Unit-01  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion Panned Scenes             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 21, 2017 11:28 pm This person has done Yui-sama's work. Yoink! Moderate pity that it only includes pans that can completely fill up a rectangle. (E.g., diagonal pans and zooming pans are left out.) I'm going to hope that EoE is up next.

[]: Re: Evangelion Panned Scenes             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Apr 22, 2017 12:02 am Reichu wrote: Moderate pity that it only includes pans that can completely fill up a rectangle. (E.g., diagonal pans and zooming pans are left out.) I'm going to hope that EoE is up next.

[]: Re: Evangelion Panned Scenes             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Apr 22, 2017 12:59 am He's also done a few from GitS and Akira .
